introduction--docs.name: Docs
introduction--docs.title: Introduction
introduction--docs.content:
# Welcome to Acme Design System

Acme Design System is a collection of reusable React components, hooks, and design tokens for building consistent user interfaces.

## Getting started

Install the package and import the components you need.

```bash
npm install @acme/design-system
```

## Principles

- **Accessible** — all components meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards.
- **Composable** — small, focused primitives that combine well.
- **Themeable** — design tokens let you adapt the system to your brand.

components-alert-guidelines-usage--docs.name: Docs
components-alert-guidelines-usage--docs.title: Components/Alert/Guidelines/Usage
components-alert-guidelines-usage--docs.content:
# Alert Usage Guidelines

## When to use

Use an Alert to surface important, time-sensitive information that requires the user's attention but does not block their workflow.

## Variants

| Variant   | Purpose                              |
|-----------|--------------------------------------|
| `info`    | Neutral informational message        |
| `success` | Confirm a completed action           |
| `warning` | Warn about a potentially risky state |
| `error`   | Report a failure or blocking issue   |

## Do

- Keep alert copy concise — one or two sentences.
- Use `dismissible` when the message is non-critical.

## Don't

- Don't stack more than two alerts on the same page.
- Don't use alerts for marketing or promotional content.

components-overview--docs.name: Docs
components-overview--docs.title: Components/Overview
components-overview--docs.content:
# Components Overview

The Acme Design System provides the following categories of components:

- **Buttons** — `Button`, `IconButton`
- **Feedback** — `Alert`, `Toast`, `Spinner`
- **Layout** — `Stack`, `Grid`, `Divider`
- **Forms** — `Input`, `Select`, `Checkbox`, `RadioGroup`
- **Navigation** — `Tabs`, `Breadcrumb`, `Pagination`

Each component is documented with usage guidelines, props, and live examples.
